start_page.title: KeePass
start_page.open_database_error: Could not open the database file. Please select it again.
start_page.biometric_save_message: Do you want to enable biometric access to open your database with your fingerprint?

settings_page.title: Settings
settings_page.screenshot_protection_subtitle: Prevents screenshots and screen recording while using the app
settings_page.screenshot_protection_disable_warning: Disabling screenshot protection reduces security. For safety, your session will be closed and you'll need to enter your master password again. Do you want to continue?

about_page.title: About
about_page.secure_text: Your database is encrypted with the KeePass (.kdbx) format. Your master password and vault never leave your device.
about_page.open_source_text: KeepassUX is free and open source software. Anyone can review the code, contribute, or report issues on the official repository.

autofill_settings_page.title: Autofill
autofill_settings_page.intro: Autofill lets KeepassUX suggest and fill your saved usernames and passwords in other apps and in your browser. For autocomplete to work correctly you must activate the following options.
autofill_settings_page.autofill_toggle_description: Makes KeepassUX the autofill service Android uses, so it can suggest and fill your saved credentials directly in login fields across apps and browsers.
autofill_settings_page.keyboard_toggle_description: A companion keyboard that types your credentials into the focused field. Some browsers only let a third-party service read login fields once their own autofill is turned off, so the keyboard covers those cases.

kdf_settings_page.title: Database security
kdf_settings_page.help_text: These values control how long the database takes to unlock and how resistant it is against brute-force attacks.
kdf_settings_page.error_out_of_range: Must be a number between {} and {}

alerts.biometric_text: You can enable biometric access to open your database with your fingerprint. Find it in Settings.
alerts.drag_text: Long-press any entry or folder and drag it to another folder to move it.
alerts.empty_text: Tap the + button to add your first entries or folders.

delete.title: Move to trash
delete.confirm_entry: Are you sure you want to move this entry to the trash?
delete.confirm_group: Are you sure you want to move this group and all its contents to the trash?

trash.restore_message: Drag the item out to restore it
trash.confirm_delete_entry: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this entry?
trash.confirm_delete_group: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this group and all its contents?
trash.info_delete: To permanently delete an item, tap the delete button next to it.
trash.info_restore: To restore an item, long-press and drag it out of the trash.

autofill.needs_setup_message: Open KeepassUX and select your database before using autofill.
autofill.open_database_error: Could not open the database. Please try again.
autofill.confirm_associate_message: Associate "{label}" with {source} so it appears automatically next time?
autofill.cannot_autofill_message_keyboard_enabled:
The {where} form doesn't support direct autofill (common in apps built with Jetpack Compose).

Switch to the KeepassUX keyboard and tap Username or Password to type in the data for "{label}".
autofill.cannot_autofill_message_keyboard_disable:
The {where} form doesn't support direct autofill (common in apps built with Jetpack Compose).

To fill it you need to enable the KeepassUX keyboard once. After that you can switch to it and tap Username or Password.
autofill.empty_no_matches:
No entry matches this app.
Search above to associate one.
